label: severe_problem
interpretation: Clearly below practical KBO/SSG threshold; likely kill unless offset by exceptional evidence.

label: well_below
interpretation: Major weakness; requires strong offsetting reason.

label: below_average
interpretation: Playable only if other source-backed traits are strong.

label: fringe
interpretation: Close call; requires context and role protection.

label: average
interpretation: Acceptable for role if cost/risk is reasonable.

label: solid
interpretation: Positive role fit; worth continued review.

label: plus
interpretation: Strong reason to continue if market/medical gates pass.

label: impact
interpretation: Impact trait for KBO context; verify source quality carefully.

label: elite
interpretation: Rare trait; also likely raises acquisition/access skepticism.
